seoTitle: Coongulla vs Coonooer West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coongulla and Coonooer West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coongulla vs Coonooer West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coongulla and Coonooer West.
heading: Coongulla vs Coonooer West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coongulla, Victoria and Coonooer West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coonooer West has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Coongulla (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coongulla or Coonooer West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coongulla has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Coonooer West scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coongulla scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Coonooer West scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coongulla or Coonooer West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coonooer West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
